title: Index
text:
### Disclaimers

The National Research Platform currently has no storage that is suitable for HIPAA, PID, FISMA, FERPA, or protected data of any kind. Users are not permitted to store such data on NRP machines.

### Start using the cluster - 🔍 [Best ways of using the NRP](/documentation/userdocs/start/using-nautilus/) - 🎛️ [Run GPU pod](/documentation/userdocs/running/gpu-pods/) - 🎴 [Run batch jobs](/documentation/userdocs/running/jobs/) (**Don't use "sleep" in those**); 🚀 [make them run fast](/documentation/userdocs/running/io-jobs/) - 🐳 [Explore the images we provide](/documentation/userdocs/running/sci-img/) - 💾 [Use persistent storage](/documentation/userdocs/storage/ceph/) and ☁️ [move your data in and out](/documentation/userdocs/storage/move-data/) - 🤖 [Use LLMs we provide](/documentation/userdocs/ai/llm-managed/) or run yours 🧠 [in JupyterHub](/documentation/userdocs/jupyter/jupyter-pod/) ### Other links - 💎 [Services you can use](/documentation/userdocs/start/resources/) (many require separate registration) - 🗺️ [Cluster nodes map](https://elastic-igrok.nrp-nautilus.io/login?next=%2Fapp%2Fdashboards%3Fauth_provider_hint%3Danonymous1&auth_provider_hint=anonymous1#/view/76b9b030-81d5-11eb-ad7c-1f5ec373b923?_g=(filters%3A!())) and 🔗 [Busy cluster map with all connections](https://traceroute.nrp-nautilus.io) - 📊 [Dashboard](https://dash.nrp-nautilus.io/)
